title: A Mod About Baking Soda
description: Modfest 26 entry that adds baking soda volcanoes and other things in that area
body:
# A Mod About Baking Soda
The most famous use for baking soda for most people is that of the "Baking Soda Volcano" experiment where mixing it with vinegar causes a kind of eruption.

This mod is a submission to ModFest 26 "Animation, Affection, Academia!" of which I'm sure you can see which category it fits in.

![Baking Soda Volcano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eef5351b48bcf21e0ea36ece24bf677a8512cb92.png)

![recipe for volcano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aad1f43e70e5f73b0dcc9957d47bb19fe550ef6.png)

The main feature of this mod is of course, the aforementioned volcano, which you craft with stone, iron and vinegar (which is obtained by smelting any potion).

![Erupting volcano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rh6YC5O1/images/e3ad9a56e7f97f2139369596cc89130b1141419d.gif)

Dropping baking soda (found by mining Trona ore (looks like smooth quartz) and then crafting it) into the volcano causes it to erupt.

![Colourful volcano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rh6YC5O1/images/858a31f2755728b5143193a791c063a35b7b0786.gif)

Dropping a dye (or dyed item!) into the volcano changes it's particle colours!

![Soda Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/070daddbdd8d62d465a725889e06b3cd2a5a62a9.png)

Combining a baking soda with 3 wheat gives you 3 bread, this might be soda bread in a future update

![Fire Extinguisher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rh6YC5O1/images/db5b68d645f8ed785975d7090e1de5d0d94b26e4.gif)

![Extinguisher Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/711634b573bd5db2007221597ee9ccf2297bf5c4.png)

A fire extinguisher can be crafted (using copper ingots, a bucket, black concrete powder and a quartz block) a baking soda from the offhand is used to extinguish all fires within a 5 block radius
